posts.author: Dada42 (Arthur Marrast)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

I noticed that whenever I am making some changes on the table widged, the update will be done on the board but it won’t happen on the table of the dashboard unless I completely refresh the tab or switch the dashboard. I am currently using an add-on in order to do this automatically.

Is this thing on your todo list ? I think it could be a really interesting feature since we can modify a board from a dashboard with the table widget

Thanks

posts.author: kimberlyg (Kimberly Giambrone)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this help too! I would like to route approvals through my dashboard by giving stakeholders a single link – but it seems pointless if I have to give them a new dashboard link EVERY time something is ready to review.
